name: ace-it-up-workspace
description: Ace It Up Placement Readiness workspace scripts

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm start --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && mkdir -p public && cp -r client/dist/* public/
